ApmDescribeAlarms.level: Alarm severity filter; values: NOTICE-Notice, WARNING-Warning, MAJOR-Major, CRITICAL-Critical
ApmDescribeAlarms.metricKind: Metric type filter; values: SERVER-Server performance, CLIENT-Client performance, DB-Database, PRODUCER_CONSUMER-Producer/Consumer, INTERNAL_FUNCTION-Internal function, JVM-JVM monitoring, EXCEPTION-Exception monitoring
ApmDescribeAlarms.state: Alarm state filter; values: OK-Recovered, ALERT-Alerting, NODATA-No data, CLOSED-Closed
ApmDescribeAlarms.orderBy: Sort field; default: startTime; values: startTime-Alarm start time
ApmDescribeAlarms.order: Sort order; default: desc; values: desc-Descending, asc-Ascending
